name: Vizi Beam CMY

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: ADC7526D-5D1F-4BEE-8E41-8ECA770EA52F

comment: The ADJ Lighting Vizi Beam CMY is a high-performance moving head beam fixture that features a 310W Osram Sirius HRI discharge lamp, CMY color mixing and a wealth of advanced features for the modern lighting professional.
